candidates.question: Calculate the travel time for 654 km at a speed of 50 km/h. Then determine how many values in the set [74, 18, 92, 68] exceed that travel time. Finally, find the remaining stock after selling 57 units of that last count.
Take the given value and format it as a percent string. Using that resulting string, extract its initials. Then, convert that second result entirely to lowercase.
Pad the number 5881 with zeros to make a total width of 5 digits. Convert that padded string into a URL slug format. Then, take that slug and convert it into another URL slug.
Find the area of an ellipse with axes measuring 14 and 2. Decrease that area by 25%. Finally, calculate what percentage this reduced value is of the number 438.
Calculate the total minutes in 10 hours and 18 minutes. Raise that total to the power of 2. Then, multiply that squared result by 29.
